name: Classic Haircut
description: Precision scissor and clipper cut, tailored to your style, finished with a hot towel neck shave.

name: Signature Skin Fade
description: Razor-sharp fade blended seamlessly into your chosen style, finished with line-up detailing.

name: Beard Sculpt & Trim
description: Shape, trim and define your beard with straight razor edging and beard oil finish.

name: Traditional Hot Towel Shave
description: A relaxing straight-razor shave with hot towel steaming, pre-shave oil and soothing balm.

name: The Full Package
description: Haircut, beard sculpt, and hot towel shave combined — our most popular premium experience.

name: Junior Cut (Under 12)
description: A patient, friendly cut for our youngest clients in a comfortable, fun environment.

name: Grey Blending & Color
description: Subtle grey blending or full color service using premium ammonia-free products.

name: VIP Executive Package
description: Haircut, shave, facial cleanse, scalp massage and styling — the ultimate grooming experience.
